use_cases: Displaying product or content information in grid-based layouts
Creating consistent card-based UI patterns across SaaS dashboards
Building e-commerce product listings with visual and text content
Presenting feature highlights or testimonials in media applications
Structuring information hierarchy in data-display sections
ai_summary: A flexible composite card component from aghasisahakyan1 featuring multiple sub-components (CardBody, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardVisual) for structured content display. Built with dark mode support, accessibility attributes (ARIA labels), and group-based styling hooks for potential hover effects. The component follows a minimalist flat design with subtle shadows and borders, making it suitable for product cards, feature highlights, or content summaries across SaaS, e-commerce, and media platforms.
